manifests.summary: Illustrative seed fixtures; since fully replaced.

FIRST REAL RESEARCH PASS — replaces the illustrative seed entirely. Corrects the Challenger claim layer with the actual published Jan-May 2026 figures (YTD reconciles exactly: 397,755 total / 87,714 AI). Adds 19 real, primary-sourced 2026 layoff events tiered conservatively: 7 B1 (firm itself cited AI; 5 clean + 2 mixed-cause), 5 B2 (structural inference), 1 B3 (headlines-only), 6 B0 (not AI). Flips data provenance to 'researched'. Every B-tier is flagged for human review; see Provenance.
manifests.analyst: Phase-1 agent (Claude), 3 parallel research agents + seam-verification of flagship B1s.
